mapper.sql: id, name_cn, name_en, topic, category_id, status, create_time, last_update_time, create_by, last_update_by
mapper.select: SELECT e.*, c.name_cn AS category_name FROM openplatform_v2_event_t e LEFT JOIN openplatform_v2_category_t c ON e.category_id = c.id WHERE e.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE openplatform_v2_event_t SET name_cn = #{nameCn}, name_en = #{nameEn}, topic = #{topic}, category_id = #{categoryId}, status = #{status}, last_update_time = #{lastUpdateTime}, last_update_by = #{lastUpdateBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM openplatform_v2_subscription_t s INNER JOIN openplatform_v2_permission_t p ON s.permission_id = p.id WHERE p.resource_type = 'event' AND p.resource_id = #{eventId}
